title: Middle Eastern Eggplant Delight
description: A flavorful eggplant dish with crispy texture, inspired by Middle Eastern cuisine. Serve warm and enjoy with pita or rice.
instructions: Brush both sides of eggplant slices with olive oil, then season with salt, cumin, and paprika.
Arrange eggplant slices on a baking sheet, leaving space between each slice.
Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway through.
While eggplant is roasting, heat baba ghanoush in a saucepan over low heat.
Once eggplant is done, let it cool slightly, then serve warm with baba ghanoush.
Garnish with minced garlic, if desired.
